title: Licensee to remit to creditors
doc_html:
§2594.  Licensee to remit to creditors

Each licensee shall remit the funds received by it, less the amount withheld for fees and charges as hereinabove provided, to the creditors promptly after receipt of funds.  

Acts 1970, No. 423, §14.
doc_text:
§2594.  Licensee to remit to creditors
Each licensee shall remit the funds received by it, less the amount withheld for fees and charges as hereinabove provided, to the creditors promptly after receipt of funds.
Acts 1970, No. 423, §14.
